forecast.name: This Afternoon
forecast.detailedForecast: Rain before 5pm, then rain and snow. Cloudy. High near 53, with temperatures falling to around 37 in the afternoon. West wind around 10 mph, with gusts as high as 21 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.shortForecast: Rain And Snow then Partly Cloudy
forecast.detailedForecast: Rain and snow before 11pm. Partly cloudy, with a low around 29. Northwest wind 7 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New snow accumulation of less than half an inch possible.

weather_report:
The afternoon in Boston unfolds under a canopy of soft gray, as the clouds gather, heavy with the promise of rain and snow. A chill whispers through the air, hinting that winter has not yet relinquished its grip. As the temperatures begin to dip, those venturing outside might choose to wrap themselves in layers, perhaps a warm scarf and a sturdy coat, to shield against the dampness that will soon settle in. The scent of rain mingles with the fading traces of early spring, a reminder of the seasons' restless dance.

As night approaches, the rain and snow will give way to a clearer sky, adorned with scattered clouds. The roads will glisten softly under the streetlights, reflecting the muted calm of the evening. It may be a fine time for a quiet stroll through the neighborhoods, the air crisp and invigorating, or perhaps to curl up with a book inside a favorite café. Evening brings with it an invitation to savor the stillness that often accompanies such weather, allowing one to find beauty in this transitional phase—a soft contrast to the vibrancy of the day that was.
